[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101101101 6
1 110101010 5
2 010110001 4
3 111110000 5
4 010101010 4
5 101000001 3
6 000110000 2
7 110101010 5

01 10 001100001 3
12 21 100101000 3
23 32 010100000 2
34 43 010110000 3
45 54 010100000 2
56 65 000100010 2
67 76 100000000 1
70 07 001000001 2

02 20 000100010 2
13 31 000100001 2
24 42 110100000 3
35 53 010100000 2
46 64 100100000 2
57 75 000001000 1
60 06 000100010 2
71 17 101001101 5

03 30 000100001 2
14 41 101100000 3
25 52 010101010 4 match 4
36 63 000100000 1
47 74 101010000 3
50 05 000100010 2
61 16 100100000 2
72 27 100001000 2

15 51 000101000 2
26 62 100100010 3
37 73 000010001 2
